---
title: "Education, Science & Innovation"
title-block-banner: "#6B7280"
title-block-banner-color: "#F7F4EE"
body-classes: area-education
---

![](../visual_assets/brand/botanical/solid/leaf-display-slate.svg){.overview-leaf fig-alt="The Canada Observatory leaf in the Education, Science & Innovation colour"}

What Canadians pay to learn, what the country spends on research, and how much of that becomes business innovation — set against peer countries.

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-education width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-education.svg){.area-banner}

### [Education](index.qmd)
University tuition over time, by province, by field, and domestic versus
international.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-education width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-education.svg){.area-banner}

### [Science](../science/index.qmd)
Research and development spending (GERD) and the size of Canada's research
workforce, against peers.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-education width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-education.svg){.area-banner}

### [Innovation](../innovation/index.qmd)
Business expenditure on research and development (BERD), against peers.
:::

::::
